title: viburnum plicatum f. rotundifolium
intro: Viburnum plicatum f. rotundifolium, also known as the Korean spice viburnum, is a flowering plant species that is a variant of the Viburnum plicatum, native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Viburnum plicatum f. rotundifolium include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and colds. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
